benefits.description: Canker sores resolved and did not recur for ~4 months (January to late April). Previously averaged 1 canker sore per month lasting ~7 days. Upon discontinuation during 10-day vacation, canker sores returned on days 9-10.

protocol_notes: Started January 2025. Stopped peptide use during 10-day overseas vacation in late April; canker sores recurred on days 9-10 of vacation, providing temporal confirmation of efficacy.
